risks.description: Exposure to risks arising from a rapidly evolving renewable energy sector due to technological and market changes.
Global business operations across diverse markets introduce operational challenges requiring structured risk management.
Financial and strategic risks stemming from global economic fluctuations affecting short- to medium-term objectives.
Potential regulatory hurdles impacting compliance and business strategy across global markets.
Material risks including climate change mitigation and responsible business conduct affecting strategic goals.
mitigation: Review by Executive Management Team, Board of Directors, Audit Committee every six months
